description_long: This perfume bottle features a tall, cylindrical body made of frosted or semi-transparent glass, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The bottle is topped with a spherical, frosted cap that sits on a metallic gold collar, adding a touch of luxury and elegance. A black label with white, stylized text reading 'Lycan' is prominently displayed on the front, with artistic drips extending downward from the label's lower edge. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a smooth surface, while the gold accent and bold label provide visual interest. The bottle appears to be designed for easy handling and display, suitable for both personal use and as a decorative item. The cap is likely removable, allowing access to the perfume inside.
description: A tall, frosted cylindrical perfume bottle with a gold collar, spherical frosted cap, and a bold black 'Lycan' label on the front. The design is sleek, modern, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from an angle, highlighting the gold collar, frosted spherical cap, and a partial view of the black label on the side.
description_view_1: The front view shows the black 'Lycan' label with white text and dripping accents, centered on the frosted cylindrical body beneath the gold collar and cap.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the edge of the label and the smooth, uninterrupted frosted glass surface, with the cap and collar clearly visible.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the bottle, showing the label's reverse side faintly through the frosted glass and the clean, unadorned surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A black rectangular label with white, stylized script text 'Lycan' and dripping paint effect, located on the front center of the bottle.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is a frosted, spherical shape made of plastic or glass, sitting atop a metallic gold collar. It is smooth, semi-transparent, and likely removable, serving both decorative and functional purposes.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is a tall, slender cylinder with a flat base and a rounded, spherical cap, creating a clean and symmetrical outline.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold metallic collar at the neck
Black label with dripping paint effect
